name: libnet-whois-ip-perl
title: libnet-whois-ip-perl
summary: Lookup whois entries of IP addresses with Perl
description:
Lookup whois entries of IP addresses with Perl
Net::Whois::IP is a module to do whois lookup of IP addresses. It
should recursively query the various whois providers until it gets
the more detailed information including either TechPhone or
OrgTechPhone by default; however, this is overrideable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-whois-ip-perl because Lookup whois entries of IP addresses with Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-whois-ip-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-whois-ip-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-whois-ip-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
